task_completion.description: Add an Integer field labeled 'Stock Level' to the 'Default' product variation type with a minimum value of 0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Drupal 'Manage fields' page for the 'Default' product variation type showing the 'Stock Level' (field_stock_level) field, or the field settings page showing it is an Integer with a minimum value of 0.

task_completion.description: Update the stock level for the Sony WH-1000XM5 to 3 units
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product variation edit page or a product list showing the Sony WH-1000XM5 (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) with a Stock Level of 3.

task_completion.description: Update the stock level for the Logitech MX Master 3S to 25 units
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product variation edit page or a product list showing the Logitech MX Master 3S (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S) with a Stock Level of 25.

task_completion.description: Update the stock level for the Bose product to 0 units
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product variation edit page or a product list showing a Bose product (either QuietComfort 45 or QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds) with a Stock Level of 0.

task_completion.description: Create a View named 'Low Stock Report' with a Page display at path '/admin/reports/low-stock' showing Variation Title, SKU, and Stock Level
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Views configuration UI for 'Low Stock Report' showing the Page display, the path set to '/admin/reports/low-stock', and the Fields section containing Variation Title, SKU, and Stock Level.

task_completion.description: Configure the view to filter for Stock Level < 10 and restrict access to 'Administer commerce_product' permission
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Views configuration UI showing the Filter Criteria includes 'Stock Level (< 10)' and the Page Settings Access is restricted by Permission: 'Administer commerce_product'. Alternatively, the final rendered report at '/admin/reports/low-stock' showing only items with stock < 10.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the fields, products, and views rather than executing direct database queries or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Drupal admin UI (e.g., Manage Fields, Views UI, Product Edit pages) being actively used in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser address bar shows the correct local Drupal URL, and standard Drupal UI elements are visible, properly rendered, and interactive.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply edit the HTML of a page to fake the final view or field settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate steps (e.g., saving the field, adding the view, configuring filters) rather than just a single screenshot of the final result.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected field machine name is 'field_stock_level' (Integer). The View ID should be 'low_stock_report' with the path '/admin/reports/low-stock'. The filter operator must be '<' with a value of '10'. Stock values to verify: Sony WH-1000XM5 (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) = 3, Logitech MX Master 3S (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S) = 25. Note on Bose product: The task asks to update 'Bose QuietComfort 45' to 0 units, but the seeded database actually contains 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' (SKU: BOSE-QCUE). Accept updates to the available Bose product as correct.
